CREATE TABLE geo_ring_simple (r Ring) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo_ring_simple VALUES([(1, 1), (2, 2), (2, 3), (1, 1)]);
SELECT r, toTypeName(r) FROM geo_ring_simple;
CREATE TABLE geo_ring_with_null (r Nullable(Ring)) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo_ring_with_null VALUES([NULL]);
SELECT r, toTypeName(r) FROM geo_ring_with_null;
CREATE TABLE geo_ring_multiple (id Int32, r Ring) ENGINE = Memory();
SELECT id, r, toTypeName(r) FROM geo_ring_multiple WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE geo_ring_nested (id Int32, r Array(Ring)) ENGINE = Memory();
SELECT id, arrayJoin(r) AS individual_ring, toTypeName(individual_ring) FROM geo_ring_nested;
CREATE TABLE geo_ring_join (id Int32, r Ring) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo_ring_join VALUES (1, [(1, 1), (4, 1), (4, 4), (1, 4)]);
CREATE TABLE geo_ring_info (id Int32, description String) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo_ring_info VALUES (1, 'First ring'), (2, 'Second ring');
SELECT g.id, g.r, info.description FROM geo_ring_join AS g INNER JOIN geo_ring_info AS info ON g.id = info.id;
CREATE TABLE geo_ring_combined (r1 Ring, r2 Ring) ENGINE = Memory();
SELECT r1, r2, toTypeName(r1), toTypeName(r2) FROM geo_ring_combined;
CREATE TABLE geo_ring_duplicates (r Ring) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo_ring_duplicates VALUES ([(0, 0), (0, 0), (10, 10), (10, 10)]);
SELECT r, toTypeName(r) FROM geo_ring_duplicates;
CREATE TABLE geo_ring_empty (r Ring) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo_ring_empty VALUES ([(1, 1), (1, 1)]);
SELECT r, toTypeName(r) FROM geo_ring_empty;
